shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g 'package.json' -g 'next.config.*' -g 'app/**' -g 'pages/**' -g 'AGENTS.md' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' package.json && printf '\\n--- next config candidates ---\\n' && for f in next.config.js next.config.mjs next.config.ts; do [ -f \""'$f" ] && { echo "### $f"; sed -n '"'1,220p' \""'$f"; }; done'

/bin/bash -lc "printf '%s\\n' '--- installed docs ---' && find node_modules/next/dist/docs -maxdepth 3 -type f 2>/dev/null | sort | head -200 && printf '%s\\n' '--- app files ---' && for f in app/layout.tsx app/page.tsx app/Recommendations.tsx app/ProductList.tsx AGENTS.md; do echo \"### "'$f"; sed -n '"'1,260p' \""'$f"; done'

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n -i \"partial|pre-render|cacheComponents|cache components|dynamicIO|Suspense|use cache\" node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/06-cache-components.mdx node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/02-guides node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference 2>/dev/null | head -240 && printf '\\n--- cache components guide ---\\n' && sed -n '1,280p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/06-cache-components.mdx && printf '\\n--- config type references ---\\n' && rg -n \"cacheComponents|experimental.*ppr|ppr\" node_modules/next/dist/docs node_modules/next/dist/server node_modules/next/dist -g '*.d.ts' -g '*.mdx' 2>/dev/null | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && git diff -- next.config.ts tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,120p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,180p' tsconfig.json"

/bin/bash -lc "printf '%s\\n' '--- next.config.ts ---' && sed -n '1,120p' next.config.ts && printf '%s\\n' '--- tsconfig.json ---' && sed -n '1,180p' tsconfig.json && printf '%s\\n' '--- generated files ---' && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f \\( -name 'tsconfig.json' -o -name 'next.config.ts' \\) -print"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
